name: node-console-control-strings
title: node-console-control-strings
description:
cross-platform tested terminal/console command strings
This is a library for doing things like color and cursor positioning. This is
a subset of both ansi and vt100. All control codes included work on both
Windows & Unix-like OSes, except where noted.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-console-control-strings because cross-platform tested terminal/console command strings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-console-control-strings as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-console-control-strings with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-console-control-strings --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
